0.help: The overall bandwidth is limited by the number of channels. To increase/decrease the bandwidth, increase/decrease the spectral averaging parameter.

1.help: Maximum bandwidth available for Low AA2 is 150 MHz.

changeProposal.content2: Some data specific to the Science Verification Idea type may be lost.

email.label: Email
email.help: The email is a required field. The participant will be invited to participate in this Science Verification Idea using this email, so please ensure it is correct. If using the search functionality, the email should be of a registered user within SKAO systems. For example, @skao.int, @assoc.skao.int, or @community.skao.int.

invitation.subject: Science Verification Idea invitation.
invitation.body: You have been invited to contribute to Science Verification Idea {{id}}

email.error: Email invite was unsuccessful and member is not added

emailSearch.error: User could not be found. Please check the email address and try again.

desc.4: These projects require more than one Science Verification Idea cycle to complete (e.g., long-term monitoring campaigns) but are too short in overall observing time, limited in observatory resources and/or scientific scope to qualify as a KSP.

proposalAttribute.help: One or more of these optional attributes may be selected to further refine the Science Verification Idea.

proposals.empty: THERE ARE NO SCIENCE VERIFICATION IDEAS TO BE DISPLAYED
proposals.label: Science Verification Ideas

proposalType.help: Select from the options below the most appropriate type classification for the Science Verification Idea. This can be changed later if needed, but be aware that this may affect information previously entered.

scienceCategory.validationNavigationError: Observation mode and a target are required. They are located on the Details and Target pages.

viewProposalIcon.clicked: View Science Verification Idea Icon clicked

0.desc: Welcome to the Ideas submission tool for Science Verification! The current call is for SKA-Low AA2. In just a few simple steps, you can share an idea with us. During this stage of SV, ideas are limited to one source observed in one observing mode. To begin, provide a title for the science verification idea.

1.desc: All collaborators must have an SKA account. If you add someone that does not yet have an account, they will receive an invitation to register.

2.title: Describe the Science Verification Idea
2.pageError: The DETAILS page is not complete
2.desc: Choose the mode (Continuum, Spectral Line, or PST) the Science Verification idea will be testing. Only one mode can be chosen for this stage of Science Verification. Your selection will define the available settings on the pages that follow. Add a summary describing the science verification idea.

3.label: Description
3.title: Upload a description of the Science Verification Idea
3.desc: Provide a description of the science verification idea, outlining how it will contribute to the Science Verification of SKA-Low. The description must be uploaded as a PDF file and must not exceed X pages.
3.pageError: The DESCRIPTION page is not complete
3.help: This document should include a brief justification of the target, the suggested observations and its suitability for Science Verification.

4.desc: Science Verification ideas in the current call are limited to one target only. Enter the target details below. The system will generate a visibility plot for SKA-Low to support planning. Please ensure the coordinates and source information are correct.

5.desc: The available parameters on this page are determined by the mode you selected earlier. Review the configuration below and provide the required observing details. Some parameters are predefined for Science Verification and cannot be modified.
5.noTarget: IT IS NOT CURRENTLY POSSIBLE TO VIEW THE  OBSERVATION SET-UP,  AS THERE ARE NO TARGET / OBSERVATION MODE SELECTED FOR THIS SCIENCE VERIFICATION IDEA. THE OBSERVATION MODE CAN BE SELECTED ON THE DETAILS PAGE.

6.noObservations: IT IS NOT CURRENTLY POSSIBLE TO VIEW THE CALIBRATION STRATEGY, AS THERE ARE NO TARGET / OBSERVATION MODE SELECTED FOR THIS SCIENCE VERIFICATION IDEA. OBSERVATION MODE CAN BE SELECTED ON THE DETAILS PAGE.

7.desc: This page outlines the data products available for the selected mode. Science Verification includes a predefined set of ODPs. You may adjust the active parameters. Sensitivity estimates for the target are provided below to help you assess the expected performance.

8.noObservations: IT IS NOT CURRENTLY POSSIBLE TO VIEW THE DATA PRODUCTS, AS THERE ARE NO TARGET / OBSERVATION MODE SELECTED FOR THIS SCIENCE VERIFICATION IDEA. OBSERVATION MODE CAN BE SELECTED ON THE DETAILS PAGE.
8.noProducts: THERE ARE NO DATA PRODUCTS ASSOCIATED WITH THIS SCIENCE VERIFICATION IDEA

9.noObservations: IT IS NOT CURRENTLY POSSIBLE TO VIEW THE CALIBRATION STRATEGY AS THERE ARE NO TARGET / OBSERVATION COMBINATIONS FOR THIS SCIENCE VERIFICATION IDEA

11.desc: Optionally add further suggested parameters of the observation setup.

page.noObservations: NO OBSERVATION SETUP IS ASSOCIATED WITH THIS SCIENCE VERIFICATION IDEA
